topics.title: Kid Rock and the Scott Stamp Strange Tape
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Kid Rock regarding his involvement in an infamous sex tape involving Scott Stamp, their shared history with various celebrities, and personal reflections on past relationships.

topics.summary: The studio features Kid Rock discussing his new live album, past interactions with celebrities like Tommy Lee and Pam Anderson, and the logistics of touring and merchandise sales.

topics.title: Academy Award Betting and News Updates

topics.title: Iraq Conflict and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses the instability of Iraq following Saddam Hussein's removal, the status of Osama bin Laden, a high school basketball success story involving an autistic student, and various local news reports.
